events.label: assistant
events.text: Written to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: entry cannot be authorized — the permit is missing LEL, H2S, and CO readings (only O2 was tested) and has no bump-test record for the meter used, so even the logged 20.9% O2 value can't be trusted. Decision is `fail` with `critical` risk until full atmospheric testing is completed, documented, and the meter's calibration is verified.
